entry.title: New: BILL077(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO BUDGET EXECUTION.

Requires the City to provide any authorized legislative user with direct access to all budget management software systems necessary to enable real-time tracking and monitoring of expenditures made pursuant to the executive operating budget ordinance and executive capital budget ordinance.

Latest action: Second reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
